title: Overhauled Crafting
description: Overhauled Crafting aims to redefine what crafting can be. With over 50 new recipes, you'll have plenty of flexibility to play your way.
body:
# **Overhauled Craftitng**

This datapack was designed and tested for single-player only. Multiplayer may or may not function correctly.

Overhauled Crafting aims to redefine the way you play. Minecraft has been around for years, we all know and love the game, but sometimes vanilla just isn't enough. The modding community is one great example of the extreme feats we achieved. But what about making vanilla enhanced without all the extreme changes? That is where Overhauled Crafting comes in. There are over 50 new Crafting Recipes in Overhauled Crafting, so what are you waiting for?

Play your way. 

# **Looking for more?**

For more information, visit my official site at https://www.mystic7055.com

![Alt text](https://i.imgur.com/YTH66bL.png "Overhauled Crafting")
